nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives events from any GL365-integrated platform. Replace this node with the platform-specific trigger (e.g., Cal.com webhook, ServiceTitan webhook, etc.) when cloning this template.

nodes.name: Normalize Event
nodes.notes: Normalizes raw platform data into GL365 journal format. Customize the field mapping for each platform.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: =[{"role":"user","content":"Write a single, concise sentence summarizing this customer event for a service business CRM journal. Be specific, include names and key details. Event type: {{$json.event_type}}. Source: {{$json.source}}. Customer: {{$json.contact_name}}. Raw data: {{JSON.stringify($json.raw_data).substring(0, 500)}}"}]

nodes.name: AI Summary Generator
nodes.notes: Generates a 1-sentence human-readable summary of the event using Claude Haiku via OpenRouter. This is what the Retell agent reads via get_memory — it needs to be natural language, not raw JSON.

nodes.name: Extract Summary
nodes.notes: Extracts the AI summary from the OpenRouter response and merges it with the normalized event data.

nodes.name: Write to Customer Journal
nodes.notes: Inserts the journal entry into Supabase customer_journal table. Uses the service role key for server-side access through RLS.

nodes.name: Is Critical?
nodes.notes: Routes critical events (emergencies, negative reviews, cancellations) to the alert notification path.

nodes.name: Slack Alert (Critical)
nodes.notes: Sends a Slack notification for critical events. Replace the webhook URL with your Slack incoming webhook.

nodes.name: Normal Event (Done)
nodes.notes: Non-critical events are simply journaled. No additional action needed.
